title: Gynochthodes phyllireoides
taxonomy: Gynochthodes phyllireoides is classified within the family Clusiaceae, commonly known as the staphylocarpous family. This family comprises a diverse range of flowering plant species, primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. Within the Clusiaceae family, Gynochthodes phyllireoides is further classified in the genus Gynochthodes, which is a group of flowering plants characterized by their small, fragrant flowers. The species G. phyllireoides is native to Southeast Asia, where it can be found growing in shaded, humid environments. The precise classification of Gynochthodes phyllireoides at the species level may vary depending on the taxonomic source.
